hyperedges.label: Access Control Sync Job Creation and Deduplication Flow
Channel Policy Assignment Lifecycle (assign, unassign, active-toggle)
Dual-role ABAC permission gate (system admin vs channel admin)
CEL Expression Evaluation Flow (check, test, validate, visual AST)
Property Field to ABAC Policy Bridge (CPA group fields as CEL attributes)

nodes.label: Job struct (Id, Type, Status, Data StringMap)
AccessControlPolicy model (ID, Type, Active, Rules, Imports, Revision)
Job data key: policy_id (scopes sync job to a single channel/policy)
Job deduplication: cancel pending/in-progress jobs for same policy_id
Channel cache invalidation on policy unassign
CPA Group (CustomProfileAttributesPropertyGroupName) – source of ABAC attribute fields
